claimText: Central and State Co-operative Banks are covered under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021.
evidenceExcerpt: The Central and State Co-operative Banks have been brought under the ambit of Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
examUse: Statement-based question on the coverage and ambit of the RB-IOS 2021.
distractorHooks: Only Scheduled Commercial Banks are covered under the scheme
Co-operative banks are explicitly excluded from the scheme
Only Primary Agricultural Credit Societies are covered

claimText: The inclusion of Co-operative Banks under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 was executed under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
evidenceExcerpt: The Central and State Co-operative Banks have been brought under the ambit of Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 under Banking regulation act, 1949.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the enabling legislation for bringing co-operative banks under the ombudsman scheme.

claimText: The Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 serves as a speedy and cost-effective alternate grievance redress mechanism for customers of regulated entities.
evidenceExcerpt: Objective: Provide customers of regulated entities (REs) a speedy, cost-effective and expeditious alternate grievance redress mechanism.
examUse: Conceptual question on the primary objective and function of the RB-IOS 2021.
distractorHooks: It is a primary judicial court for banking disputes
It only handles grievances of bank employees against management
It is a mechanism exclusively for resolving inter-bank disputes
